claim_text: Cross-module synthesis ranks evidence by claim, sample, method, uncertainty, measurement risk, and limitation rather than by a single score.
method: Evidence ledger, robustness summary, claim inventory, FDR/local-window diagnostics.
uncertainty: Reported in source tables where model estimates are present; otherwise descriptive and coverage-bound.
limitation: Synthesis depends on upstream module quality and does not create new causal identification.
